title: Forest Focus
description: A steady stream of forest ambience designed to block out distractions and help you achieve deep work.

title: Evening Rain
description: Gentle drops of rain falling on leaves, providing a naturally soothing backdrop for reading or relaxing.

title: Ocean Calm
description: The rhythmic sound of waves crashing on the shore, perfect for drifting off to sleep.

title: Morning Light
description: A quick gentle soundscape to reset your mind between tasks. Soft chimes and morning birds.

title: Midnight Drift
description: Peaceful night sounds to help you unwind after a long day.

title: Deep Meditation
description: Slow, evolving ambient pads and low frequency drones intended to ease you into a restful state.
